'''鈭歴-f-dh-dh''' ('''kasafdhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babymax|babymax]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babymax|babymax]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-f-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kasafdhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafdhedhoko|thisafdhedhoko]] || [[word:jisafdhedhoko|jisafdhedhoko]] || [[word:shisafdhedhoko|shisafdhedhoko]] || [[word:kisafdhedhoko|kisafdhedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
